headline: Is Analog Devices (ADI) Outperforming Other Computer and Technology Stocks This Year?
summary: Here is how Analog Devices (ADI) and Allegro MicroSystems, Inc. (ALGM) have performed compared to their sector so far this year.

headline: Why Japanese airlines are raising fuel surcharges as jet fuel costs fall
summary: CNBC's Monica Pitrelli explains the reason Japanese carriers are raising jet fuel surcharges, some topping $400 per ticket, as the price of jet fuel in Asia plunges to $113 per barrel.

raw.headline: Why Japanese airlines are raising fuel surcharges as jet fuel costs fall
raw.summary: CNBC's Monica Pitrelli explains the reason Japanese carriers are raising jet fuel surcharges, some topping $400 per ticket, as the price of jet fuel in Asia plunges to $113 per barrel.
